listings.title: Apartment for rent in Princess Tower, Dubai Marina
listings.descriptionTitle: Furnished 2-bedroom apartment in Princess Tower, Dubai Marina
descriptionParagraphs: Total area: 110.42 sq. m | 1,188.55 sq. ft

Bright and comfortable 2-bedroom apartment in Princess Tower featuring sea and community views. Located on the sunny side, the residence benefits from excellent natural light throughout the day, creating a warm and inviting living space.
The apartment is fully furnished and equipped with all essential kitchen appliances, making it a convenient move-in-ready home in one of Dubai Marinas most recognisable towers.
15 min walk to Sobha Realty Metro Station
25 min walk to JBR Beach & Marina Mall
Ideal for couples or families looking for a bright and comfortable home in Dubai Marina. Contact me to arrange a viewing.

Company name: Banke International Properties LLC RERA ORN: 12108 Address: 415 Emarat Atrium Building, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai, UAE Primary email: enquiries@banke.ae Website: [link not available] Company Profile: A real estate firm specializing in investment sales and leasing of both commercial and residential properties. We also offer property management services across Dubai.
